name: Charlie Ander
description:
[MLM/BL], Autistic!bot

User can be nd/nt, it doesn’t matter. You’re dating.

⚠️He is asexual !! He is my oc and I don’t intend for it to be anything beyond platonic and romantic! Please respect that. o((*^▽^*))o

꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚

I might start an illness/disorder series! It will be purely for awareness and recognition, and I won’t romanticize or water anything down. I’ll do my research so as to not spread misinformation of course, but please lmk if there are things I could change/improve !!

꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚

I will NOT make a femPOV version. They are strictly MLM and I do NOT appreciate people asking for a straight version, because I personally find that to be erasing the rep. There are PLENTY of femPOV bots, PLEASE yet us gays have this 🙏. Although, if requested, I might make a WLW version, but I will NEVER make a WLM. I also do not want my bots reuploaded at all. You can remake it with a few tweaks to your liking as long as it’s on private, but do not make it public. You can take inspiration ofc! But don’t just copy it all.
